reason: Browser-use feature successfully executed: agent opened browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved page title "Example Domain", and reported results with tool call cards visible in the chat interface.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut home page showing agents in the sidebar.
Step 2: Clicked on "QA-20260714-185041-lmy4" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent page with chat interface visible and input field ready.
Step 3: Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully entered in the textbox and sent by clicking the send button.

Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed the task in 16 seconds. Browser tools were executed successfully with visible tool call cards showing: ToolSearch, Open Browser (→ https://example.com with green checkmark), Browser MCP: Browser Get State (with green checkmark), and Close Browser (with green checkmark).

Step 5: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"." and "The page at https://example.com loaded with the heading "Example Domain". Browser closed." The response explicitly mentions "Example Domain" as required.
